---
title: "Rotterdam Gold"
description: "Longitudinal analysis of student well-being and coping strategies across multiple waves."
#date: "2025-01-07"
categories: [Longitudinal Analysis, Education, R, SPSS]
#image: rotterdam-gold.jpg
---

### Project Overview

Evaluate longitudinal survey data to understand the impact of school interventions ("focus" vs. "control" schools) on student well-being and coping strategies across four waves.

### Key Steps

1.  **Data Acquisition:** Imported SPSS datasets for four waves.
2.  **Data Cleaning:** Standardized school names and grouped them into focus/control categories.
3.  **Construct Index Calculation:** Created indices for optimism, self-efficacy, and coping strategies.
4.  **Exploratory Data Analysis:** Assessed sample sizes and summarized variables.
5.  **Results Communication:** Visualized differences and prepared recommendations.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

### Load Libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr) 
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(styler)
library(formatR)
library(rsconnect)
library(here)

```

```{r}
# Create a fake dataset for demonstration
set.seed(123)
survey_data <- data.frame(
  school_id = rep(c("A", "B", "C", "D"), each = 50),
  student_id = 1:200,
  OPTIMISM_1 = rnorm(200, mean = 3.5, sd = 0.5),
  OPTIMISM_7 = rnorm(200, mean = 3.6, sd = 0.5),
  school_group = rep(c("focus", "control"), each = 100)
)
```

**Constructing Indices:**

```{r}
# Optimism Index Example
survey_data <- survey_data %>%
  mutate(W1_OPTIMISM = rowMeans(select(., starts_with("OPTIMISM_")), na.rm = TRUE))
```

**Visualizing Results:**

```{r}
# Boxplot comparing focus and control groups
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(survey_data, aes(x = school_group, y = W1_OPTIMISM)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue") +
  labs(title = "Optimism Index by School Group", x = "Group", y = "Optimism Index")
```

**Outcome:** - Insights supported intervention strategies by highlighting differences in well-being between focus and control schools. - Recommendations were provided to improve program effectiveness and data collection.

::: {.callout-note title="Publication"}
Rotterdam Goud: Eindrapport Pilot Rotterdams Goud: Wijzen van leren en sociaal-emotioneel welbevinden. [Dijkstra, K., & el Ghani, A., (2024).](https://www.kenniswerkplaats-rotterdamstalent.nl/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/Rapport-Rotterdam-Goud.pdf)
:::
